MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-23-2020 IN 206, DEFENDANTS HILDA & ALICE, INC. AND RUBEN RODRIGUEZ' MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL WAS HEARD. SCOTT HUTCHISON, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE ANY COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS PURSUANT TO LOCAL RULE 2.7(B). COUNSEL INSTRUCTED TO PAY A $60 MOTION CONTINUANCE FEE WITH THE CLERK'S OFFICE. THE COURT FOUND GOOD CAUSE AND GRANTED THE MOTION. THE TRIAL DATE OF 01/27/20 IS CONTINUED TO 04/20/20 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM PER STIPULATION. DISCOVERY REMAINS CLOSED WITH THE EXCEPTION OF IME OF PLAINTIFF. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/GLW)
